title: Druids of Storm and Spirit
description: Spell Engine based Lightning and Soul Magic!
body:
This mod adds two spellbooks as well as multiple items used to scale Soul and Lightning magic.

There are typical staves for Lightning, but Soul scales differently. Instead of there being staves for Soul, there are shards that are worn in the off-hand slot. These items have flat bonuses for Soul magic and % bonuses for other schools of magic. Mix and match these shards with other items to produce your desired combination of spellcasting implements!

 

The Storm Spell Book is a hybrid Soul and Lightning Spell Book. Its spells scale with both Soul and Lightning attributes.

The Aetherial Spell Book is a hybrid Soul, Fire, and Frost Spell book. Its spells scale with those three attributes.

 

LOOK AT THE DEPENDENCIES PAGE, IT HAS A LOT
